description: Displays a user persona card with avatar, demographics, quote, and slotted sections for goals, frustrations, and behaviors

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Persona name (drives avatar initials and color)

attributes.name: quote
attributes.description: Key quote displayed in highlight block

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: URL to JSON file containing persona data

attributes.name: data-list-stories
attributes.description: Render a Stories section that auto-lists every <user-story persona-id="…"> matching this persona's id. Updates live when stories are added, removed, or relabeled.

slots.name: role
slots.description: Job title or role (slot fallback for attribute)

slots.name: goals
slots.description: List of what the persona wants to achieve

slots.name: frustrations
slots.description: List of pain points and blockers

slots.name: behaviors
slots.description: List of observable patterns and habits
